log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Reborn — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Reborn — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Reborn — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Reborn — Iron Concentration HP: 56/67
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Reborn — Iron Concentration HP: 41/67
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Reborn — Iron Concentration HP: 32/67

→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
